Name: Temperature Sensing
Description: Read raw temperature from ADC and post sensor data events
Acceptance Criteria: Sensor_ReadTemperature returns valid ADC reading; EVENT:SENSOR_DATA_READY posted

Name: Humidity Sensing
Description: Read raw humidity from ADC and post sensor data events
Acceptance Criteria: Sensor_ReadHumidity returns valid ADC reading; EVENT:SENSOR_DATA_READY posted

Name: Sensor Calibration
Description: Apply factory calibration offsets using controller data
Acceptance Criteria: Sensor_Calibrate retrieves and applies offsets from Controller_GetCalibration

Name: Remote Status Reporting
Description: Publish device status to cloud via MQTT and handle shadow sync
Acceptance Criteria: Comm_SendStatus publishes to MQTT; shadow events update connectivity state

Name: Remote Command Handling
Description: Receive remote commands and dispatch control actions
Acceptance Criteria: Comm_OnRemoteCommand parses command and posts EVENT:CONTROL_ACTION

Name: Control Loop Processing
Description: Process sensor data against thresholds and dispatch control actions
Acceptance Criteria: Controller_OnSensorData evaluates thresholds; Controller_ReportStatus sends status

Name: OTA Firmware Update
Description: Orchestrate firmware update: download coordination and flash write and verify
Acceptance Criteria: OTA state machine progresses through download/write/verify; CRC passes before reporting success

Name: OTA Download Coordination
Description: Stream firmware chunks from HTTP server for OTA processing
Acceptance Criteria: Comm_DownloadFirmware streams chunks and posts completion event

Name: Event Bus Infrastructure
Description: Bitmask-based event registration and dispatch for inter-module communication
Acceptance Criteria: Event_register accepts bitmask+handler; Event_post dispatches to matching handlers

Name: Device Environmental Monitoring
Description: The system shall continuously monitor temperature and humidity and report to cloud
Acceptance Criteria: Sensor readings aggregated and transmitted; cloud receives telemetry within reporting interval

Name: Remote Device Control
Description: The system shall accept remote commands from cloud and execute control actions
Acceptance Criteria: Cloud command received within 30s; control action executed and status reported back

Name: Over-the-Air Firmware Update
Description: The system shall support remote firmware updates with integrity verification
Acceptance Criteria: OTA completes download/flash/verify cycle; device reports success or failure to cloud
